message:
feat(seo): add OpenGraph/Twitter card metadata and security headers

Add social sharing metadata and hardening headers across the site:

OpenGraph + Twitter Cards:
- about/layout.tsx: add openGraph and twitter card metadata
- consulting/layout.tsx: add twitter card metadata (OG already present)
- contact/layout.tsx: add twitter card metadata (OG already present)
- media/layout.tsx: add twitter card metadata (OG already present)
- projects/layout.tsx: add twitter card metadata (OG already present)
- New OG image generators for consulting, contact, media, nvidia-story
  routes using Next.js dynamic image generation

Security & Caching Headers (next.config.mjs):
- Add immutable Cache-Control for /_next/static/* (1 year, immutable)
- Add security headers on all routes: X-Content-Type-Options (nosniff),
  X-Frame-Options (DENY), Referrer-Policy (strict-origin-when-cross-origin)

Closes bd-1uvf (OpenGraph metadata) and bd-2dbp (caching headers).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+ {/* Grid pattern */} +
+ + {/* Glowing orb - amber top left */} +
+ + {/* Glowing orb - orange bottom right */} +
+ + {/* Accent orb - blue center */} +
+ + {/* Main content */} +
+ {/* Left side - Strategy/Chart icon */} +
+ {/* Outer glow */} +
+ + {/* Strategy SVG */} + +
+ + {/* Right side - Text content */} +
+ {/* Page label */} +

+ + {/* Title */} +

+
+ ), + { + ...size, + } + ); +}
